# Design Intend

> Architecture, construction, and interior design studio in Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India. Founded 2014 by Ar. Chittrarasan.

Design Intend provides end-to-end architectural and interior design services in Hosur, Krishnagiri District, Tamil Nadu. The studio handles everything from initial concept and drawings to full construction supervision and interior fitout — clients get a single point of contact from blank plot to finished home or commercial space.

Principal architect: Ar. Chittrarasan (Adhiyaman College of Engineering, Hosur). Founded: 2014. Service area: Hosur, Krishnagiri, Bengaluru, Perithalmanna (Kerala).

Contact: +91 73976 06382 | info@designintend.com | https://wa.me/917397606382

Address: No.2, Second Floor, Balamurugan Towers, Nanjundeeswar Nagar Ring Road, Hosur, Tamil Nadu 635109, India

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://www.designintend.com/): Studio overview, services, featured projects, testimonials, and contact
- [Portfolio](https://www.designintend.com/portfolio.html): Full project gallery — residential, commercial, and interior projects
- [Build Your Home Guide](https://www.designintend.com/build-your-home-hosur.html): Comprehensive guide to building a home in Hosur — planning, approvals, costs, choosing a builder

## Architecture Services

- [Architects in Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/architects-hosur.html): Residential and commercial architectural design, concept to completion
- [Design & Build Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/design-build-hosur.html): Single-contract architecture + construction — one team, one fee, full responsibility

## Construction Services

- [Construction Company Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/construction-company-hosur.html): House and commercial construction with fixed-price contracts and site engineer supervision
- [House Construction Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/house-construction-hosur.html): End-to-end house construction from foundation to handover
- [Villa Construction Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/villa-construction-hosur.html): Premium and luxury villa construction in Hosur
- [Turnkey Construction Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/turnkey-construction-hosur.html): Complete turnkey construction including civil work and interiors

## Interior Design Services

- [Interior Designers Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/interior-designers-hosur.html): Full-home interior design and execution — living, bedroom, kitchen, bathrooms
- [Home Interiors Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/home-interiors-hosur.html): Interior design packages for completed homes
- [Modular Kitchen Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/modular-kitchen-hosur.html): Custom modular kitchen design with Hettich/Hafele hardware and quartz countertops
- [2BHK Interior Design Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/2bhk-interior-design-hosur.html): Complete 2BHK interior packages with transparent pricing

## Cost Guides & Calculator

- [Construction Cost Calculator](https://www.designintend.com/construction-cost-hosur.html): Interactive 3-step calculator — instant estimate for Standard, Premium, or Luxury build
- [House Construction Cost Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/house-construction-cost-hosur.html): 2026 guide — Standard Rs 1,950, Premium Rs 2,050, Luxury Rs 2,300 per sq ft
- [Interior Design Cost Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/interior-design-cost-hosur.html): 2026 guide — room-by-room breakdown, package tiers, red flags to watch for

## Comparison / Best-of Pages

- [Best Interior Designers Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/best-interior-designers-hosur.html): How to evaluate and choose an interior designer in Hosur — criteria and red flags
- [Best Builders Hosur](https://www.designintend.com/best-builders-hosur.html): How to choose a reliable builder — what to check before signing a contract
